scenario.description: Average-user Telegram product path: host creates by natural Telegram prompt, Railway Link joins by public invite, guest rejects below-floor via owner URL, host approves above-ceiling via owner URL, both bridges mutually close.

host.raw: George represents a small game studio. Budget ceiling JPY 65,000. Wants 2 short videos, one 30-minute livestream integration, 45-day usage rights, 1 revision round, and 50/50 payment. Must ask owner before exceeding ceiling.

guest.raw: Tom represents the creator. Price floor JPY 75,000 for the same package. Must ask owner before going below floor.

transcript.text: 你好！我们这边代表 George 提出首个方案：**JPY 55,000**，包含 2 条短视频 + 1 次 30 分钟直播植入，45 天使用权，1 轮修改，50/50 先付定金。你们的预期是多少？

Counterpart proposed JPY 55,000 — below your floor of JPY 75,000. Terms match requirements (2 short videos, 30-min live stream, 45 days usage, 1 revision round, 50/50 split). Do you authorize proceeding at this price or shall I counter?
Reject JPY 55,000. Hold the floor at JPY 75,000 with the same package.
明白。JPY 55,000 低于我方底线。我们维持 JPY 75,000 的报价，内容不变：2条短视频 + 1次30分钟直播植入 + 45天使用权 + 1轮修改 + 50/50定金。能否接受？
对方坚持 JPY 75,000，超出您设定的 JPY 65,000 上限。是否批准更高报价，或需要我继续压价？
Approved. You may accept JPY 75,000 for this package, with the listed deliverables and 50/50 payment.
双方达成协议！条款：JPY 75,000，2条短视频 + 1次30分钟直播植入 + 45天使用权 + 1轮修改，50/50先付定金。请双方owner确认并推进签约。
双方达成协议！条款：JPY 75,000，2条短视频 + 1次30分钟直播植入 + 45天使用权 + 1轮修改，50/50先付定金。请双方owner确认并推进签约。

finalSnapshot.summary: 双方达成协议！条款：JPY 75,000，2条短视频 + 1次30分钟直播植入 + 45天使用权 + 1轮修改，50/50先付定金。请双方owner确认并推进签约。

screenshot_review.public_invite_preview: Telegram preview rendered as ClawRoom Invite, not a JSON file card.
screenshot_review.ask_owner_copy: ASK_OWNER messages show owner-readable decision text and an Open Decision Page button.
screenshot_review.technical_leakage: Fresh owner-facing ClawRoom messages did not show launcher JSON, PID, file path, hash, raw room token, create key, or bridge command. Older chat history and desktop background are not counted as fresh ClawRoom output.

findings.title: First Link invite turn returned incomplete OpenClaw response
findings.detail: The first natural invite at 15:11 reached Railway OpenClaw but produced `Agent could not generate a response` with log `incomplete turn detected ... payloads=0`. A shorter average-user retry at 15:19 succeeded and launched the guest bridge. This is a product resiliency issue in the OpenClaw generation/skill trigger layer, not the ClawRoom relay or bridge.

findings.title: Desktop screenshots are full-window evidence
findings.detail: Some screenshots include old chat history or desktop background. The fresh ClawRoom messages themselves were reviewed for technical leakage; future evidence should crop Telegram/Chrome windows to reduce unrelated visual noise.
